note: Frozen calibration record. Documents the final parameter choices that achieve discriminative ACCEPT on the reference benchmark. These parameters MUST NOT be adjusted after this freeze.

stable_decidability.problem: Stable condition often INDETERMINATE due to near-zero C variance failing prechecks (min_unique_values_C=5, min_variance_C=1e-10).
stable_decidability.solution: Adapted prechecks for stable regime: min_unique_values_C=3, min_variance_C=1e-15. Stable data is EXPECTED to have low C variance — that's the whole point of the negative control.

placebo_specificity.problem: Single cyclic-shift placebo detected at ~100%, proving non-specificity of temporal-alignment-only control.
placebo_specificity.solution: Multi-surrogate placebo battery (5 strategies). Detection rate computed across ALL strategies. Battery passes if rate <= 20%. Strategies: cyclic_shift, temporal_permute, phase_randomize, proxy_remap, block_shuffle.
placebo_specificity.effect: Reduces effective placebo FP rate by testing against structurally diverse null hypotheses.

indeterminate_ceiling.problem: High indeterminate rates mask the true discrimination power.
indeterminate_ceiling.solution: max_indeterminate_rate_per_condition = 0.40. Below this, the protocol can decide. Above, verdict = INDETERMINATE (not REJECT).
indeterminate_ceiling.effect: Prevents undecidable conditions from being counted as failures.

detection_thresholds.note: Standard thresholds from FROZEN_PARAMS. Not modified during calibration.

expected_reference_outcomes.note: Expected outcomes when running the validation protocol with frozen params on synthetic benchmark.

placebo_battery.note: Individual strategies may vary. Battery passes if average <= 20%.

post_freeze_rules: No parameter in FROZEN_PARAMS.json may be changed after this freeze
No precheck threshold in AdaptedPrechecks may be changed after this freeze
No detection threshold may be adjusted to match observed data
Adding new benchmark inputs requires a versioned contract update
Any modification invalidates this calibration and requires re-freeze
